data.label: Style
data.name: w33s3 Dark
data.description: Dark, moody atmosphere with high contrast lighting. Cinematic composition with neon accent colors against deep blacks. Professional photography feel, dramatic shadows, rich color depth. Modern minimalist aesthetic, no text or watermarks.

data.label: Action
data.content: Noir comic book style, muted blacks and grays with selective teal and warm white accents. Medical education scene: a tablet or screen showing an anatomical knee cross-section illustration, audio waveform visible below, timeline with marker dots showing progress through content. Clean clinical aesthetic but with dramatic noir lighting. Professional healthcare technology feel, no text.
